en.title: ISAC · Letting Sensing and Communication Work Within the Same Electromagnetic Map

fields.Badge: Vertical Datasheet · ISAC / Integrated Sensing and Communication
fields.Headline: Letting Sensing and Communication Work Within the Same Electromagnetic Map
fields.Headline-em: The EM Twin of ISAC Integrated Sensing and Communication
fields.Sub: ISAC is one of the most imaginative directions of 5G-A/6G, but it also poses new challenges to channel modeling and testing: the same beam of signal simultaneously carries communication and sensing, where echoes, images, specular reflections, and multipath are no longer interference but "signal." MetaRadio uses three product layers to simultaneously output sensing radar echoes and communication multipath, enabling ISAC algorithms, terminals, and networks to be developed and validated within the same high-fidelity EM twin.

items.title: Headline
items.text: Letting Sensing and Communication Work Within the Same Electromagnetic Map

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: The EM Twin of ISAC Integrated Sensing and Communication

items.title: Sub
items.text: ISAC is one of the most imaginative directions of 5G-A/6G, but it also poses new challenges to channel modeling and testing: the same beam of signal simultaneously carries communication and sensing, where echoes, images, specular reflections, and multipath are no longer interference but "signal." MetaRadio uses three product layers to simultaneously output sensing radar echoes and communication multipath, enabling ISAC algorithms, terminals, and networks to be developed and validated within the same high-fidelity EM twin.

sections.label: The Modeling and Testing Difficulties of ISAC
sections.heading: Challenge · The Modeling and Testing Difficulties of ISAC

fields.Title: The "Symbiotic Channel" of Communication and Sensing — Traditional Models Cannot Provide Answers
fields.Description: Traditional channel simulation only cares about the communication-side PDP/CDL, and radar simulation only cares about RCS and echoes; ISAC requires the physical consistency of both at once. Multi-base-station coordinated (Bistatic/Multistatic) sensing further makes "whether the echo of the same object is consistent across different links" a critical question.

table.Title: Dual-Output Consistency
table.Text: The communication multipath and sensing echo of the same target at the same moment must be physically consistent, which traditional tools struggle to deliver simultaneously.

table.Title: Multi-Station Coordinated Sensing
table.Text: The geometry and multipath under Bistatic/Multistatic configurations are interdependent, requiring full-field simultaneous simulation.

table.Title: Algorithm and Hardware Iteration
table.Text: Sensing algorithms, waveforms, and hardware require rapid regression testing, yet a repeatable high-fidelity ISAC channel is lacking.

sections.label: Deployment of the Three Product Layers in ISAC
sections.heading: Solution · Deployment of the Three Product Layers in ISAC

fields.Title: One Ray Tracing, Simultaneously Outputting "Communication Channel + Sensing Echo"
fields.Description: Within a single simulation, Lauraycs simultaneously outputs the communication-side CIR/PDP and the target echo on the sensing side (including RCS, multipath, Doppler), forming a unified channel source for ISAC algorithms and hardware. L2 provides ISAC terminal HIL, and L3 turns the ISAC network into a subscribable twin service.

table.Description: Simultaneously outputs sensing echo and communication multipath; supports target RCS, moving-target trajectories, and multi-base-station coordination.
Uses the ISAC channel to drive the channel emulator and radar test bench, performing joint HIL on ISAC modules/terminals.
An electromagnetic-situation twin of the multi-base-station ISAC network, serving as the runtime infrastructure for sensing services.

table.Title: Scene and Target Modeling
table.Desc: City/campus/factory 3D + moving-target (people, vehicles, objects) trajectories + target RCS models.

table.Title: ISAC Dual-Output Simulation
table.Desc: A single simulation simultaneously outputs the communication CIR and the sensing echo (including target multipath decomposition).

table.Title: ISAC HIL
table.Desc: Joint drive by channel emulator + radar test bench, regressing sensing and communication KPIs.

table.Title: Network Twin Service
table.Desc: A multi-base-station sensing-situation twin, providing target-level APIs and visualization.

table.Spec: Communication, sensing, ISAC mono-static, ISAC bistatic mode, Bistatic, Multistatic
FR1 / FR2 / FR3 / sub-THz; typical ISAC bands 26/28/60/77/140 GHz
Target RCS, range-Doppler, AoA/AoD, echo multipath clusters, target-level annotation
Arbitrary programmable trajectories; supports people, vehicles, robots, drones; micro-Doppler optional
Communication channel emulator + radar test bench + ISAC terminal OTA
Automatically produces annotated target-channel dual-perspective datasets, usable for ISAC algorithm training
Private cloud, GPU clusters; supports factory/campus-level deployment

fields.Physically consistent dual output: Communication multipath and sensing echo come from the same ray tracing, avoiding inconsistencies from manual stitching.
fields.Native support for multi-station coordin: Full-field simultaneous refresh under Bistatic/Multistatic geometry, conforming to real ISAC networks.
fields.Annotatable training data: Directly produces the target-level + channel-level annotated datasets that ISAC algorithms require.
fields.Multi-band coverage: From FR1 all the way to sub-THz, a single engine spans the 5G-A/6G ISAC research path.
fields.HIL and twin linkage: After algorithms are regressed on HIL, they can be directly connected to the EM twin for live-network situation assessment.
fields.Explainable: Every echo/multipath can be traced to its physical origin, facilitating algorithm debugging and paper reproduction.

items.title: Physically consistent dual output
items.text: Communication multipath and sensing echo come from the same ray tracing, avoiding inconsistencies from manual stitching.

items.title: Native support for multi-station coordination
items.text: Full-field simultaneous refresh under Bistatic/Multistatic geometry, conforming to real ISAC networks.

items.title: Annotatable training data
items.text: Directly produces the target-level + channel-level annotated datasets that ISAC algorithms require.

items.title: Multi-band coverage
items.text: From FR1 all the way to sub-THz, a single engine spans the 5G-A/6G ISAC research path.

items.title: HIL and twin linkage
items.text: After algorithms are regressed on HIL, they can be directly connected to the EM twin for live-network situation assessment.

items.title: Explainable
items.text: Every echo/multipath can be traced to its physical origin, facilitating algorithm debugging and paper reproduction.

table.Title: Human Motion Sensing
table.Text: Indoor/campus personnel presence and posture sensing based on 5G-A signals.

table.Title: Vehicle-Road Sensing
table.Text: Coordinated sensing of vehicles/pedestrians/non-motorized vehicles by roadside ISAC stations.

table.Title: Factory Safety
table.Text: Personnel intrusion detection in heavy-equipment zones, AGV path sensing.

table.Title: Low-Altitude Sensing
table.Text: Detection and tracking of small-target drones in urban low-altitude airspace.

table.Title: Urban Situation
table.Text: Density of people and vehicle flow and abnormal-behavior sensing in key areas.

table.Title: 6G AI Training
table.Text: Large-scale high-fidelity ISAC data used for AI-native algorithm training.

table.Label: Joint validation with domestic ISAC research institutes and equipment vendors
Backed by publicly published ISAC simulation cases
Entering the mainstream toolchain of 6G integrated sensing and communication research

zh-CN.title: ISAC 通感一体 · 让感知与通信在同一份电磁图中工作

fields.Badge: Vertical Datasheet · ISAC / Integrated Sensing and Communication
fields.Eyebrow: 行业垂直市场解决方案
fields.Headline: 让感知与通信在同一份电磁图中工作
fields.Headline-em: ISAC 通感一体的电磁孪生
fields.Sub: ISAC 是 5G-A/6G 最具想象力的方向之一，但它也对信道建模与测试提出了新挑战：同一束信号同时承载通信与感知，回波、镜像、镜面与多径不再是干扰而是"信号"。乾径以三层产品同时输出感知雷达回波与通信多径，让 ISAC 算法、终端与网络可以在同一份高保真电磁孪生中开发与验证。

items.title: Badge
items.text: Vertical Datasheet · ISAC / Integrated Sensing and Communication

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: 行业垂直市场解决方案

items.title: Headline
items.text: 让感知与通信在同一份电磁图中工作

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: ISAC 通感一体的电磁孪生

items.title: Sub
items.text: ISAC 是 5G-A/6G 最具想象力的方向之一，但它也对信道建模与测试提出了新挑战：同一束信号同时承载通信与感知，回波、镜像、镜面与多径不再是干扰而是"信号"。乾径以三层产品同时输出感知雷达回波与通信多径，让 ISAC 算法、终端与网络可以在同一份高保真电磁孪生中开发与验证。

table.Label: 感知回波 + 通信多径

sections.label: ISAC 的建模与测试难题
sections.heading: Challenge · ISAC 的建模与测试难题

fields.Title: 通信与感知的"共生信道"，传统模型给不出答案
fields.Description: 传统信道仿真只关心通信侧 PDP/CDL，雷达仿真只关心 RCS 与回波；ISAC 同时需要两者的物理一致性。多基站协同 (Bistatic/Multistatic) 感知更让"同一物体在不同链路上的回波是否一致"成为关键问题。

table.Title: 双输出一致性
table.Text: 同一时刻同一目标的通信多径与感知回波必须物理一致，传统工具难以同时给出。

table.Title: 多站协同感知
table.Text: Bistatic/Multistatic 配置下的几何与多径相互依赖，需要全场同时仿真。

table.Title: 算法与硬件迭代
table.Text: 感知算法、波形与硬件需要快速回归测试，但缺少可重复的高保真 ISAC 信道。

sections.label: 三层产品在 ISAC 的部署
sections.heading: Solution · 三层产品在 ISAC 的部署

fields.Title: 一份射线跟踪，同时输出"通信信道 + 感知回波"
fields.Description: Lauraycs 在同一次仿真中同时输出通信侧 CIR/PDP 和感知侧的目标回波（含 RCS、多径、Doppler），构成 ISAC 算法与硬件的统一信道源。L2 提供 ISAC 终端 HIL，L3 把 ISAC 网络做成可订阅的孪生服务。

table.Description: 同时输出感知回波与通信多径；支持目标 RCS、动目标轨迹、多基站协同。
用 ISAC 信道驱动信道仿真仪与雷达测试台，对 ISAC 模组/终端做联合 HIL。
多基站 ISAC 网络的电磁态势孪生，作为感知服务的运行时基础设施。

table.Title: 场景与目标建模
table.Desc: 城市/园区/工厂 3D + 动目标（人车物）轨迹 + 目标 RCS 模型。

table.Title: ISAC 双输出仿真
table.Desc: 同一仿真同时输出通信 CIR 与感知回波（含目标多径分解）。

table.Title: ISAC HIL
table.Desc: 信道仿真仪 + 雷达测试台联合驱动，回归感知与通信 KPI。

table.Title: 网络孪生服务
table.Desc: 多基站感知态势孪生，提供目标级 API 与可视化。

table.规格: 通信、感知、ISAC 同模、ISAC 异模、Bistatic、Multistatic
FR1 / FR2 / FR3 / sub-THz；典型 ISAC 频段 26/28/60/77/140 GHz
目标 RCS、距离-Doppler、AoA/AoD、回波多径簇、目标级标注
任意可编程轨迹；支持人、车、机器人、无人机；含微多普勒可选
通信信道仿真仪 + 雷达测试台 + ISAC 终端 OTA
自动产出标注的目标-信道双视角数据集，可用于 ISAC 算法训练
私有云、GPU 集群；支持工厂/园区级部署

fields.物理一致的双输出: 通信多径与感知回波来自同一份射线追踪，避免人工拼接不一致。
fields.多站协同原生支持: Bistatic/Multistatic 几何下全场同时刷新，符合真实 ISAC 网络。
fields.可标注训练数据: 直接产出 ISAC 算法所需的目标级 + 信道级标注数据集。
fields.覆盖多频段: 从 FR1 一直到 sub-THz，单一引擎跨 5G-A/6G ISAC 研究路径。
fields.HIL 与孪生联动: 算法在 HIL 上回归后，可直接接入电磁孪生做现网态势评估。
fields.可解释: 每条回波/多径可追溯物理来源，便于算法 debug 与论文复现。

table.Title: 人体动作感知
table.Text: 室内/园区基于 5G-A 信号的人员存在与姿态感知。

table.Title: 车路感知
table.Text: 路侧 ISAC 站对车辆/行人/非机动车的协同感知。

table.Title: 工厂安全
table.Text: 重型设备区域的人员闯入检测、AGV 路径感知。

table.Title: 低空感知
table.Text: 城市低空对小目标无人机的探测与跟踪。

table.Title: 城市态势
table.Text: 重点区域人车流密度与异常行为感知。

table.Title: 6G AI 训练
table.Text: 大规模高保真 ISAC 数据用于 AI-native 算法训练。

table.Label: 国内 ISAC 研究院与设备商联合验证
公开发表的 ISAC 仿真案例支撑
进入 6G 通感一体研究主流工具链
